welcome_offer.description: Earn 140,000 Bonus Points after spending $3,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening

earning_rates.notes: Earn 1X points on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Fourth Night Free
other_benefits.description: Get a fourth night free on award stays of 3+ nights

rules.description: Cannot be approved if 5 or more new personal credit cards opened in the past 24 months

recurring_credits.name: Free Night Award
recurring_credits.description: Annual Free Night Award at eligible IHG Hotels & Resorts worldwide; up to 40,000-point cap (can add own points to redeem at higher categories).

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application fee, every 4 years.

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 off one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order each calendar quarter (DashMart, 7-Eleven, CVS, Safeway, etc.). Requires active DashPass enrollment. Per Chase cobrand-doordash terms.
